title: Clearance of uncleared Ports and Air Cargo Complexes.-Circular No.21/99-Customs, dated 6.5.99
description: Clearance of uncleared Ports and Air Cargo Complexes.-Circular No.21/99-Customs, dated 6.5.99
text: F.No. 450/145/97-Cus IV Circular No. 21/99-Cus dated 6/5/1999 Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue Central Board of Excise & Customs, New Delhi Subect : Clearance of uncleared Ports amd Air Cargo Complexes. I am directed to inform that in letter No. 046 IV dated 17.10.1997 read with letter dated 20.9.1997 Board has across dispose of unclaimed and uncleared cargo landed in the IPB meeting dated 20.3.1999 at Chennai, it has been dated actin to clear the goods laying upto 31.12.1998 within the . I fhere are no court cases preventing such disposal and witin court cases involved. Board desires you to take expeditious action for these goods and report results achieved. Similar action can be taken in future also perison initiative. -- 1 of 1 --
